commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8ada369b4f7859882592967890c94e44cb1bbcec)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps `acquireSessionWriteLock` release to reread the lock file after the inner release and force-remove it when the remaining payload PID matches the current process.

PR surface: Source +15. Total +15 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regression from source inspection: current tests require a reentrant lock file to remain until the final release, while the added PID-only fallback would remove it after an earlier release. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the patch needs a lock-safety revision and the external PR still lacks real behavior proof that automation cannot provide.

target.title: fix(session): add fallback lock file cleanup on session write-lock release
target.author: immortal-autumn

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
